title: All of the bosses
description: Adds almost every possible boss to the game
body:
This modpack is made to add as many bosses as possible. And it adds a lot of them.
This modpack has:

too many bosses. for example cataclysm bosses of mass destruction aquamirae stalwart dungeons and the undergarden
dimensions
dungeons
structures
mobs
